posts.author: Luigie (Luwidge)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Can we request that, at the latest, in the 4th quarter, we see the chart of the board or the dashboard in the email? It is viewable already in the email, not just the link.

What are you trying to achieve

Easy to View in email only.
